properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We are a chosen generation Rise up, holy nation God, we live for You You have called us out of darkness Into light so glorious God, we live for You We live for You God, we live for You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We run with passion for Your name, we run Freedom, You've broken every chain, we run Our God will not be moved Our God will never be shaken We run to You, we run

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We are a chosen generation Rise up, holy nation God, we live for You You have called us out of darkness Into light so glorious God, we live for You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We are a chosen generation Rise up, holy nation God, we live for You You have called us out of darkness Into light so glorious God, we live for You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Our God will not be moved Our God will never be shaken Our God will not be moved Our God will never be shaken Our God will not be moved Our God will never be shaken We run to You, we run
